label: Geometry
shortDescription: Euclidean geometry, proofs, congruence, similarity, circles, and spatial reasoning.
modulesDescription: Read the geometry chapters in order, or jump directly to the topic you need.
ogDescription: Master Euclidean geometry, triangle congruence, circles, coordinate geometry, transformations, and an introduction to projective and non-Euclidean geometries — with detailed explanations, worked examples, and practice questions.
courseDescription: A complete geometry course covering foundations (points, lines, planes, axioms), triangle congruence and similarity, Pythagorean theorem, circles and polygons, coordinate methods, isometries and symmetry, and non-Euclidean geometries. Features ELI5 intuition, step-by-step worked examples, common mistakes, and hundreds of practice problems.

topics.title: Foundations of Geometry
topics.description: Points, lines, planes, angles, axioms, Euclid's Elements, and the parallel postulate.

topics.title: Triangles
topics.description: Triangle properties, congruence and similarity criteria, the Pythagorean theorem, and key theorems.

topics.title: Circles & Polygons
topics.description: Circles, radii and diameters, polygons, inscribed angles, and area.

topics.title: Coordinate Geometry
topics.description: The coordinate plane, distance and midpoint, slope, lines, circles, parabolas, and ellipses.

topics.title: Transformations & Symmetry
topics.description: Isometries, translations, rotations, reflections, symmetry groups, and congruence transformations.

topics.title: Advanced Geometries
topics.description: Projective, non-Euclidean, hyperbolic, elliptic, and spherical geometry.
